# QUERY_NOTIFICATION_REASON_RECORD_CREATED

****

A record matching the subscription’s predicate was created.

## Declaration

```swift
const String QUERY_NOTIFICATION_REASON_RECORD_CREATED;
```

## Constants

- **QUERY_NOTIFICATION_REASON_RECORD_DELETED**: A record matching the subscription’s predicate was deleted.
- **QUERY_NOTIFICATION_REASON_RECORD_UPDATED**: A record matching the subscription’s predicate was updated.
